full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H).

Dispase dissociation media included 19.4 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 400 µl Dispase + 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 17.8 ml DMEM/F12+++, 2 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 200 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 1x 4.07x10^5 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 1x 7.07x10^5 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 7.31x10^5 | 7.02x10^5
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 4.72x10^5 | 1.36x10^5
 | viability [%] | 64.6 | 19.3
 | size [µm] | 41.7 | 17.2
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 0.862x10^5 | 7.11x10^5
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 0.0411x10^5 | 1.23x10^5
 | viability [%] | 4.8 | 17.3
 | size [µm] | 22.6 | 15.9
Average | [cells/ml] | 4.07x10^5 | 7.07x10^5
 | total [cells] | 4.07x10^5 in 1mL | 7.07x10^5 in 1mL
 | viability [%] | 34.7 | 18.3
